name: The Night Shift
short_description: The Night Shift is a Third Person OpenWorld game, where players live their Adventure freely, in a day and night circle where wildlife became more dangerous at night. Free content updates and new random weekly quests and zones will include for keep the community rewarded.
detailed_description:
The Night Shift is a combination of Hack&Slash and Survival game. With a handful of humans surviving the Great War, you will be joining the ranks of Adventurers to carry the hopes of humanity towards future.

You will be completing quests from Adventurer Guild to reach higher ranks, learn the story of this world and discover deadliest enemies where you need to defeat to ensure the survival of the humans.

With the rewards you collect from quests, you will be crafting new equipments and artifacts to help you with your Adventure.

With 7 different quest levels which are F, E, D, C, B, A and S ranks, you will have a long time to live your Adventurer life.
